Projects

Python

  • Sorting Network Generator 1st sem exam

    Generating optimal sorting networks for lists.

  • C3Paw — Cat & Dog Classifier 4th sem exam

    CNN-based image classifier using PyTorch.

  • Path & CNN Optimization 4th sem exam

    Shortest-path algorithms and CNN optimisation.

  • Mood2-D2 — Emotion Classifier 4th sem exam

    Classifying human emotions from facial expressions.

  • Simplex Environment Search 4th sem exam

    Simplex method and roar-net-api solver.

  • SundAdmin API personal

    My first REST API.

Java

  • Pacman 2nd sem exam

    Pacman-like game with JavaFX.

Haskell

  • snakey 3rd sem exam

    A DSL for defining and running snake-like games.

Web

  • Typstnique personal

    A game for learning Typst syntax.

  • Practice Quiz App personal

    Quiz app for SDU exam practice — multiple choice and free response with MathJax.

Notes
